Name: FClothParameterMask_PhysMesh
Description:
A mask is simply some storage for a physical mesh parameter painted onto clothing.
  Used in the editor for users to paint onto and then target to a parameter, which
  is then later applied to a phys mesh

Variables.Name: MaskName
Variables.Description: Name of the mask, mainly for users to differentiate

Variables.Name: CurrentTarget
Variables.Description: The currently targeted parameter for the mask

Variables.Name: MaxValue
Variables.Description: The maximum value currently in the mask value array

Variables.Name: MinValue
Variables.Description: The maximum value currently in the mask value array

Variables.Name: Values
Variables.Description: The actual values stored in the mask

Variables.Name: bEnabled
Variables.Description: Whether this mask is enabled and able to effect final mesh values
